calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Uncontested Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Feb-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ALLSTATE SETTLEMENT CORPORATION's Uncontested Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By nad Between Alba Marina Ingram, Transferor, and allstate settlement corporation, transferee, pursuant to california insurance code 10134 et seq.

GRANT. No opposition filed and the petition complies with the Insurance Code. The court will sign the proposed order.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
